svg.text: ① MCP-first — every capability is a tool; the same tools power web, CMS, social & Design.
② On-brand by default — a brand-voice system makes agent-speed output genuinely on-brand.
③ Reviewed — human approval on every publish; no auto-publishing of unreviewed content.
④ Production, not placement — market1 makes creative; Claude products are ad-free (no paid slots).
⑤ Model tiering + caching → low cost-per-asset; eval-gated, brand-fit-tested reliability.
⑥ Closes the loop — content → leads → customer1; the SaaS graduation of the agency1 service.
